title: Multithreaded Mapper Implementation
description: The MultithreadedMapper.java file in the lib/map directory of Hadoop MapReduce architecture defines a multithreaded implementation for the Mapper interface. This allows for concurrent execution of map operations, enhancing throughput when the map task is not CPU-bound. It manages a thread pool, with each thread running an instance of a specified Mapper class. The core logic involves initializing a list of MapRunner threads, each handling the map function. The code ensures thread safety using SubMapRecordReader and SubMapRecordWriter for input and output operations. It heavily depends on various Hadoop classes and interfaces for proper functioning within the MapReduce framework.
